summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Astreon Core Interface. All core features functional including boot sequence, System HUD, theme toggle, navigation, contact form with mocked API, and mobile responsiveness. Performance optimization needed for 60fps target.

performance_issues.issue: Theme transition taking ~1899ms instead of target 300ms
Scroll animations running at ~8.5 FPS instead of target 60 FPS
performance_issues.impact: Animations not smooth during scroll interactions

passed_tests: Hero boot sequence: INITIALIZING ASTREON CORE → SYSTEM ONLINE → content reveal
System HUD displays OPTIMAL status with FPS, LOAD, TIME metrics
Background system with grid, light beams, central orb with rings
Theme toggle switches light/dark modes correctly
Navigation links (Identity, Modules, Matrix, Transmission) functional
Hero CTAs clickable with hover effects (Enter System, Transmission)
Contact form submission with mocked API - shows success message
Mobile responsiveness - menu works, HUD hidden on mobile
Card hover effects working (12 module cards found)
Button scale effects on hover (max 1.05 scale)
Orb fade/scale behavior on scroll implemented
action_item_for_main_agent: Optimize animation performance to achieve 60fps target. Consider reducing animation complexity or using CSS transforms instead of JavaScript animations. Theme transition timing needs optimization to meet 300ms target.
